summary: 21:15Z cycle. Sprint is functionally COMPLETE. All 3 sprint issues resolved: #1202 merged (PR #1252 aab prefix-strip), #1208 merged (PR #1238 heredoc body strip), #1139 in PR #1255 (safe-subshell allowlist — rebased this cycle, CI pending). Bonus: merged PR #1264 (go-kernel event bus closes #1086, all CI green). Prior blockers cleared: #1238 merged, #1252 merged. Health upgraded from yellow to green. Senior agent delivered; PR #1255 rebased by EM. Next sprint: #1113 (security_reminder_hook blocking GH Actions writes — easy P1 win) then KE-2 proper (Canonical ActionContext, v3.0 blocker).

prs.title: fix(matchers): safe-subshell allowlist — prevent $(date) false positives (closes #1139)
prs.note: Rebased by EM onto origin/main (fa3c050). CodeQL was failing pre-rebase due to stale baseline. Post-rebase CI expected to clear — lint/test/analyze all passed pre-rebase. Contains 17 new tests (5 unit, 2 integration, 3 security, 7 edge cases). Merge when CI confirms green.

mergedThisCycle.title: feat(go-kernel): wire event bus for KE-3 telemetry + sub-ms benchmarks
mergedThisCycle.note: All CI green (CodeQL pass, analyze pass, lint pass, test-and-build pass). MergeState CLEAN. Sub-ms enforcement validated: p50 = 721 ns/op. Telemetry failures swallowed via recover() — enforcement is never blocked by subscriber code. Kernel squad bonus delivery this cycle.

actionsThisCycle.description: Branch was 3 commits behind main (fa3c050, 7eb3dca, 7bbc85d). Rebased cleanly — 1 senior commit (db0d6ce → 0322998), no conflicts. Force-pushed with lease.
Go-kernel event bus: all CI green, MergeState CLEAN, no required reviews. Squash-merged.

prBudget.note: Kernel squad: 1 PR open (#1255). Repo total 9 includes site/marketing/hq/studio EM reports — only kernel-owned PRs count against squad budget. Within limit.

retryLoops.note: Senior delivered PR #1255. No stuck retry loops detected.

openSprintIssues.title: [dogfood] Safe date command substitution inside gh pr comment body blocked as dangerous shell expansion
openSprintIssues.note: stripSafeSubshells() added to command-scanner.ts. 17 new tests. Rebased by EM this cycle. Merge when CI green.

closedThisSprint.note: AAB normalization: strip rtk/time/timeout wrapper prefixes before git/github detection. Closes 3,825+ unintended denials.
Heredoc body strip before governance path scan. Was BEHIND main at 20:30Z — rebase completed and merged.
MCP prefix match: aab.ts uses startsWith() for mcp.call target.
Go-kernel event bus: KE-3 telemetry wired. Sub-ms enforcement (p50 = 721 ns/op).

notableIssues.title: Swarm Health Alert — 2026-03-28
notableIssues.label: priority:P0
notableIssues.note: 85.7% stuck worker rate (12/14 agents). Filed 06:02Z — ~15h unresolved. No kernel code path to resolve. Kernel squad stuck worktrees from #1186 (kernel-sr-3130733, kernel-sr-3169888) are old 28h+ entries — these are dead PIDs from a prior cron failure event (2026-03-27 01:17–01:44 UTC). Required actions remain: git worktree prune, /tmp/ PID cleanup, cron collision fix, cron daemon verification, 4x capacity oversubscription.

notableIssues.title: security_reminder_hook blocks Write on GH Actions workflows instead of warning
notableIssues.label: priority:high
notableIssues.note: P1 quick win: security_reminder_hook.py exits with error code instead of 0 (warning) on first Write to .github/workflows/*.yml. Agent must retry identical write. Fix: change exit code to 0. Low risk, low complexity. Assign to senior after #1255 merges.

escalations.description: Swarm health P0 persists. 15h unresolved. Kernel squad cannot act — ops/director owns.
recommendedActions: git worktree prune in main repo to remove stale entries
Clean dead PID files in /tmp/ (18 dead PIDs, 14x copilot-detached-*.pid)
Fix cron collisions: (0 6 * * *: copilot-docs-sync vs qa-performance-agent) and (45 */6 * * *: cloud-qa-smoke-runner vs qa-issue-analyst)
Verify cron daemon is running — /tmp/agentguard-runs/ not present
Address 4x oversubscription: 133 enabled agents vs 32 max_workers

escalationRules.notes: All prior sprint blockers resolved. P0 #1186 swarm health persists — ops escalation only. Health upgraded to GREEN.

dogfoodObservations.description: No governance blocks encountered during this EM run. git rebase, push --force-with-lease, gh pr merge all executed without denial. The #1202 fix (aab prefix-strip) appears to have resolved the rtk command normalization failures that prior EM runs documented.
